question.content: Introduce auxiliary isothermal and adiabatic reference curves, identify area regions, and write W_AB, DeltaU_AB, and Q_AB as area expressions. Output exactly one ASCII line with three semicolon-separated fields in the form W_AB:...;DeltaU_AB:...;Q_AB:...; do not use '=' or any equation form, no Chinese characters, no prose sentence, and no extra text. Answer format: `W_AB:...;DeltaU_AB:...;Q_AB:...`; write only the field labels and values, with no explanatory text, units, or equals signs.

step_1.content: Introduce auxiliary isothermal and adiabatic reference curves and identify area regions.

step_3.content: Map each thermodynamic quantity to the corresponding signed area expression.
step_3.key_point: Each thermodynamic quantity to the corresponding signed area expression.
